subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of God! Be thou occupied with the remembrance of God and detach thy heart from all else but Him, for His remembrance is the companion of the soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه الله بذکر الله مشغول باش و از ماسوایش دل بردار چه که ذکرش مونس جانست
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab, @suffering and imprisonment, @station of the Manifestation of God
